cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out this ethical dilemma. The user is part of a group of friends who often gossip. One day, they overhear their friends saying mean things about their best friend, who isn't there. The question is whether to tell the best friend and risk hurting feelings and causing conflict or to keep it a secret, which feels like lying by omission. Hmm. Let me start by breaking down the situation. The main characters here are the person (the user) and the group of friends, including the best friend. The gossip is happening when the best friend isn't present, so the user is in a position where they know something
